== UPDATE PATCHES FOR ZETA WIKIPEDIA PAGE ==

=== 1. Infobox Updates ===
Replace:
| latest_release_version = v0.5.0
| latest_release_date = {{Start date|2026|3|29}}

With:
| latest_release_version = v0.3.19 (Rust implementation)
| latest_preview_version = v0.5.0 (Pure Zeta, in development)
| latest_release_date = {{Start date|2026|3|29}}

=== 2. Introduction Update ===
Add after first paragraph:

The latest release, v0.3.19 "The Integration Release" (March 29, 2026), adds comprehensive async/await support, algebraic data types, macro system enhancements, and standard library integration. Development continues toward v0.5.0, which will be a pure Zeta self-hosted implementation with complete generic type system support.

=== 3. Release History Section Restructure ===
Current table has 27 rows and is too long. Recommend adding collapsible sections:

{{Collapsible section
| title = Release History
| collapsed = no
| content = 

;v0.0.x series (Initial releases)
{{Collapsible section
| title = 
| collapsed = yes
| content = 
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Version !! Date !! Notes
|-
| v0.0.0 || November 27, 2025 || Initial prototype
|-
| v0.0.1 || December 4, 2025 || Pre-release
|-
| ... (v0.0.2 through v0.0.9) ...
|}
}}

;v0.1.x series (Core features)
{{Collapsible section
| title = 
| collapsed = yes
| content = 
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Version !! Date !! Notes
|-
| v0.1.0 || December 25, 2025 || Major refactor into modular layers
|-
| ... (v0.1.1 through v0.1.7) ...
|}
}}

;v0.2.x series (Self-hosting foundation)
{{Collapsible section
| title = 
| collapsed = yes
| content = 
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Version !! Date !! Notes
|-
| v0.2.0 || January 5, 2026 || "The Self-Hosting Dawn!"
|-
| ... (v0.2.1 through v0.2.3) ...
|}
}}

;v0.3.x series (Rust implementation maturity)
{{Collapsible section
| title = 
| collapsed = yes
| content = 
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Version !! Date !! Notes
|-
| v0.3.0 || January 20, 2026 || "The Dawn of True Self-Hosting"
|-
| v0.3.1–v0.3.18 || January–March 2026 || Incremental improvements
|-
| '''v0.3.19''' || March 29, 2026 || Async/await, algebraic data types, macros, stdlib
|}
}}

;v0.5.x series (Pure Zeta development)
{{Collapsible section
| title = 
| collapsed = yes
| content = 
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Version !! Status !! Target features
|-
| v0.5.0 || In development || Pure Zeta implementation, complete generic type system
|}
}}
}}

=== 4. Features Section Update ===
Add to Features section (or create new subsection):

==== Generic Type System ====
* Type inference with constraint solving (Hindley-Milner based)
* Monomorphization for zero-cost abstractions
* Full compatibility with Zeta v0.5.0 generic syntax
* Built-in generic types (Vec<T>, Option<T>, Result<T, E>)

==== Concurrency Model ====
* Async/await with thread-safe executor using RwLock
* M:N green-thread actors (runtime < 200 LOC)
* MPSC channels for message passing
* Future execution with proper waker implementation

=== 5. Development Model (Optional Addition) ===
Consider adding section about innovative development approach:

Zeta is developed using a multi-agent system called the "Dark Factory" which enables 24/7 autonomous progress with full public accountability through continuous integration on GitHub.

=== 6. References Update ===
Add new references for recent releases:
<ref>{{cite web|url=https://github.com/murphsicles/zeta/releases/tag/v0.3.19|title=Zeta v0.3.19 — The Integration Release|website=github.com|access-date=March 30, 2026}}</ref>
